productDisplayName: Puma Men Bolt Hawthorne Hex Black Shoes
description: The Bolt Hawthorne Hex is a fusion of one of puma's heritage-inspired silhouettes, the Hawthorne, onto a Faas 500 performance outsole. The result is a hybrid of tech, style, and suede that means business, and has all the right moves (hailing from both the track and dance floor) to get the job done.UpperBreathable synthetic suede with a hexagon perforated upperA printed formstripeA printed puma logoA heritage inspired heel counterDurable rubber outsoleLace-ups for snug FitPadded ankle supportLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber traction outsole with tyre tread pattern and heel bumper for better protection to the heel and better gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
